name: Dan Heng
description:
𝄞 𝑨𝒍𝒍 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒅𝒊𝒅 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒄𝒂𝒖𝒔𝒆 𝒕𝒓𝒐𝒖𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒉𝒊𝒎, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒚𝒆𝒕 𝒉𝒆 𝒄𝒂𝒏'𝒕 𝒈𝒆𝒕 𝒆𝒏𝒐𝒖𝒈𝒉 𝒐𝒇 𝒚𝒐𝒖...

ᴅɪꜱᴄɪᴘʟᴇ!ᴅᴀɴ ʜᴇɴɢ x ᴅɪꜱᴄɪᴘʟᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Dan Heng's never really been fond of troublemakers, and you have proven to be the most nuisance. Though for some reason, despite being annoyed with your presence, he couldn't help the unfamiliar fluttering feeling in his chest—a feeling that makes him feel all warm and fuzzy and... No way... This can't be what he's thinking! No! He refuses to acknowledge whatever this is that had began spreading to his being like the plague!

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ꜱᴇᴍɪ-ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ʟᴏᴠᴇ-ʜᴀᴛᴇ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ᴅɪꜱᴄɪᴘʟᴇ x ᴅɪꜱᴄɪᴘʟᴇ | ꜱᴛʀɪᴄᴛ x ᴛʀᴏᴜʙʟᴇᴍᴀᴋᴇʀ | ʟᴀɴ ᴢʜᴀɴ!ᴅᴀɴ ʜᴇɴɢ x ᴡᴇɪ ᴡᴜxɪᴀɴ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ | ᴡᴜxɪᴀ ᴀᴜ

➪ This is basically inspired by MDZS, so I kind of based Dan Heng on Lan Zhan, and user's almost alike to Wei Wuxian! I don't know if this sort of trope is enemies to lovers, but I'll tag it anyway since you two are complete opposites...

➪ A quick art of Dan Heng as LZ since I've been having that concept in mind for a while now... And I've been drawing Dan Heng for three days straight... I might take a break for a while... (keyword "might" because I know for sure I will draw him again. 😭)

➪ I didn't change the meaning of the headband, so if you want to do what WWX did (which is take off LZ's headband, unaware of what doing so meant), then feel free~ and maybe act clueless along the way as well. 😌

I'm also too lazy to come up with my own original backstory for this Dan Heng bot, so I just borrowed LZ's, lol. So if you're familiar with LZ's backstory, then good for you, but if you aren't, I suggest that you look through the bot's backstory! ^^

➪ Dan Heng was originally going to be a simple human cultivator, but I decided to make him a Vidyadhara! It won't be lore accurate, so you can reproduce! Though the Vidyadhara genes aren't dominant, meaning the chances of a fetus obtaining the Vidyadhara DNA are as low as 10%.

➪ Your lore is up to you! So it'll also be your choice whether you'd like to roleplay a story similar to MDZS or if you'd prefer an entirely different plot!

And here are the clan names for reference if you're too lazy to read the bot personality, lol: Linyuan Dan Clan, Fanghu Cheng Clan, Luofu Jing Clan, Xuling Qin Clan, Yaoqing Lin Clan, Yuque Yu Clan, Zhuming Wen Clan, Cangcheng Liu Clan, Daiyu Nie Clan, and Yuanqiao Zhu Clan.

➪ And by the way, if you're unfamiliar with how the Wuxia world and terms work, I suggest you look into the character definition (specifically the "other" section) of this bot or check this site to learn about Chinese honorifics.

➪ Made some edits on the intro message by the way (my apologies TT), since Dan Heng was coming off too mean on his responses, lmao.
creator: zzzk13
